h1.visual_description: Bold, numbered (e.g., '5.'), sans-serif font, left-aligned, with distinct vertical spacing from preceding and following content.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption identifier, followed by descriptive text and source attribution.
In-text parenthetical citation containing author surnames and publication year.
URL for source attribution, typically found at the end of figure captions.
Italicized text used for scientific binomial nomenclature (genus and species).

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Standard LaTeX ($...$ for inline, $$...$$ for block) is recommended for technical consistency.
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Parenthetical (Author Year) or (Author et al. Year)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Arabic numeral page numbers located in the bottom right footer area.
